svg.aria-label: MaxScale hard anti-affinity leaves a pod Pending versus soft anti-affinity spreading two pods
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net"> <diagram name="maxscale-spread"><mxGraphModel dx="900" dy="520" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="900" pageHeight="480" math="0" shadow="0" background="#0b1020"> <root> <mxCell id="0"/> <mxCell id="1" parent="0"/> <mxCell id="title" value="MaxScale redundancy — from hard to soft" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontSize=22;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#eef2ff;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="30" y="18" width="700" height="32" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="lp" value="" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#190f14;strokeColor=#5e2630;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="28" y="74" width="404" height="372" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="lh" value="HARD · required (antiAffinityEnabled)
vs MariaDB AND MaxScale → needs 5 nodes" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#ef4444;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="48" y="92" width="370" height="40"
